criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented register_agent() on NATSClient that calls self.publish() with Topics.Fleet.REGISTER and EventType.AGENT_REGISTER. Test test_register_publishes_to_fleet_register verifies the topic and envelope contents.

criteria_verification.notes: Implemented heartbeat() that resolves Topics.Fleet.HEARTBEAT with agent_id and publishes with EventType.AGENT_HEARTBEAT. Test test_heartbeat_publishes_to_correct_topic verifies the resolved topic matches fleet.heartbeat.agent-beta.

criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented get_fleet_registry() that iterates KV keys, deserializes each value as AgentManifest, returns dict[str, AgentManifest]. Test test_returns_all_registered_agents pre-populates 3 KV entries and verifies all 3 are returned with correct keys.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented get_fleet_registry() that iterates KV keys, deserializes each value as AgentManifest, returns dict[str, AgentManifest]. Test test_returns_all_registered_agents pre-populates 3 KV entries and verifies all 3 are returned with correct keys.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `get_fleet_registry()` raises `RuntimeError` when KV bucket is unavailable
criteria_verification.evidence: The _get_kv_bucket() helper wraps js.key_value() in try/except and raises RuntimeError('registry unavailable'). Test test_raises_runtime_error_when_kv_unavailable mocks key_value to raise and verifies RuntimeError.
criteria_verification.notes: The _get_kv_bucket() helper wraps js.key_value() in try/except and raises RuntimeError('registry unavailable'). Test test_raises_runtime_error_when_kv_unavailable mocks key_value to raise and verifies RuntimeError.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `watch_fleet()` callback receives registration then deregistration events in order
criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented watch_fleet() that calls kv.watch('>') and iterates entries, dispatching PUT as AgentManifest and DEL/PURGE as None. Test test_watch_fleet_receives_put_and_delete_events verifies callback receives (key, manifest) then (key, None) in order.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented watch_fleet() that calls kv.watch('>') and iterates entries, dispatching PUT as AgentManifest and DEL/PURGE as None. Test test_watch_fleet_receives_put_and_delete_events verifies callback receives (key, manifest) then (key, None) in order.

criteria_verification.evidence: Test test_register_then_deregister_leaves_consistent_state registers then immediately deregisters the same agent and verifies the KV store no longer contains the key.
criteria_verification.notes: Test test_register_then_deregister_leaves_consistent_state registers then immediately deregisters the same agent and verifies the KV store no longer contains the key.
